styles.QCheckBox::indicator: width: 18px; height: 18px; border: 2px solid #555; border-radius: 3px; background-color: #323232
styles.QComboBox: background-color: #353535; color: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #535353; border-radius: 1px; padding: 5px
styles.QComboBox::down-arrow: image: none; border-left: 5px solid transparent; border-right: 5px solid transparent; border-top: 5px solid #FFFFFF; margin-right: 2px
styles.QComboBox:on: background-color: #3C3C3C; color: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #555; border-radius: 3px; padding: 4px;
styles.QDateEdit: background-color: #353535; color: #FFFF7F; border: 1px solid #F9F9F9; border-radius: 1px; padding: 2px
styles.QDateTimeEdit: background-color: #626262; color: #FFFF7F; border: 1px solid #FFFFFF; border-radius: 2px; padding: 2px
styles.QGroupBox: background-color: #323232; color: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #535353; border-radius: 5px; margin-top: 10px; padding-top: 10px; font-weight: bold;
styles.QGroupBox::title: subcontrol-origin: margin; subcontrol-position: top left; padding: 0 5px; color: #6C99BB;
styles.QLineEdit: background-color: #353535; color: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #535353;  border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px; selection-background-color: #5B5B5B;
styles.QListWidget: background-color: #353535; color: #FFFFFF; border: 2px dashed #6C99BB; border-radius: 5px; padding: 5px;
styles.QPlainTextEdit: background-color: #353535; color: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #535353; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px;
styles.QProgressBar: background-color: #353535; color: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #535353; border-radius: 3px; text-align: center;
styles.QPushButton: background-color: #6C99BB; color: #EEEEEC; border: 1px solid #535353; border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 12px; font-weight: bold;
styles.QPushButton:checked: background-color: #0078D4; color: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #555; border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 12px;
styles.QSpinBox: background-color: #748993; color: #000000; border: 1px solid #748993; border-radius: 3px; padding: 4px
styles.QTextEdit: background-color: #353535; color: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #535353; border-radius: 3px; padding: 5px;
